sources.note: Official competition page: $11M total purse, $3.5M autonomous-track win, $1M Lockheed Martin detection bonus, June 15-25 test window, 1,000 km2 zone, 10-minute detect-and-suppress requirement.
Live blog of the Nenana, Alaska finals testing (June 11, 18, 26 2026 updates); confirms ACUASI/UAF partnership and team roster (Anduril, Dryad, AURA Foresight).
January 2026 finalist announcement: Anduril (Lattice AI, Sentry towers, Ghost-X drones), Dryad (Silvanet, Silvaguard), FireSwarm Solutions, Data Blanket, Wildfire Quest.
June 19 2026 interview with AURA Foresight team co-lead Dr. Georgios Tzoumas confirming their Detect-Verify-Act approach and Alaska finals participation.
Confirms ACUASI as one of the FAA's seven national UAS test sites and the Alaska finals test-range partner.
